def.selectionReason: Gold pack CCTV stills composed court/client lines

surfaces.label: Case header (solicitor view)
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText:
Client: Devon Walsh
Allegation: Theft from a shop, contrary to section 1(1) and 7(1) of the Theft Act 1968

surfaces.label: Court line (copy preview)
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText: The defence asks the court to record per MG6C that CCTV still images are served but master CCTV footage, full export, and continuity/provenance remain outstanding.

surfaces.label: Client-safe summary preview
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText:
CLIENT-SAFE SUMMARY
(not for court or CPS)

We are reviewing the papers in your case (Devon Walsh). This is early-stage — nothing is final until we have full disclosure and your instructions. CCTV still images are on the papers, but the master CCTV footage, full export, and continuity/provenance material are still outstanding. Stills alone do not show the full recording.

[CaseBrain — client-safe summary. Evidence state: provisional. Not for court or CPS use.]

surfaces.label: CPS chase — Master CCTV footage
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText: Please provide Master CCTV footage (see MG6C/CCTV/02) or confirm in writing why it is not available.

surfaces.label: CPS chase — Full CCTV export
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText: Please provide Full CCTV export (see MG6C/CCTV/03) or confirm in writing why it is not available.

surfaces.label: CPS chase — CCTV Continuity / provenance
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText: Please provide CCTV Continuity / provenance (see MG6C/CCTV/04) or confirm in writing why it is not available.

surfaces.label: CPS chase — CCTV audit trail / source hash
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText: Please provide CCTV audit trail / source hash (see MG6C/CCTV/05) or confirm in writing why it is not available.

surfaces.label: Evidence truth map (Overview)
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText:
• CCTV still images — served
• Full CCTV export — referred_only
• Master CCTV footage — missing
• CCTV continuity / provenance — missing
• CCTV audit trail / source hash record — missing
• Recognition / ID basis — missing

surfaces.label: Do-not-overstate warnings
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText:
• CCTV proves identity
• CCTV proves offence
• positive identification from stills
• Do not treat stills alone as proof of identity or offence.
• Do not state "Full CCTV confirms" — CCTV is not fully served on papers
